'''gajoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbox|mbox]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbox|mbox]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gajoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjeyeth|gæjeyeth]] || [[word:gæjeyej|gæjeyej]] || [[word:gæjeyesh|gæjeyesh]] || [[word:gæjeye|gæjeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajojoyoth|gajojoyoth]] || [[word:gajojoyoj|gajojoyoj]] || [[word:gajojoyosh|gajojoyosh]] || [[word:gajojoyo|gajojoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajoyoth|gajoyoth]] || [[word:gajoyoj|gajoyoj]] || [[word:gajoyosh|gajoyosh]] || [[word:gajoyo|gajoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajofyoth|gajofyoth]] || [[word:gajofyoj|gajofyoj]] || [[word:gajofyosh|gajofyosh]] || [[word:gajofyof|gajofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajoyotho|gajoyotho]] || [[word:gajoyojo|gajoyojo]] || [[word:gajoyosho|gajoyosho]] || [[word:gajoyoko|gajoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajoyoth|gajoyoth]] || [[word:gajoyoj|gajoyoj]] || [[word:gajoyosh|gajoyosh]] || [[word:gajoyo|gajoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajoyothol|gajoyothol]] || [[word:gajoyojol|gajoyojol]] || [[word:gajoyoshol|gajoyoshol]] || [[word:gajoyokol|gajoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajoyothotho|gajoyothotho]] || [[word:gajoyojojo|gajoyojojo]] || [[word:gajoyoshosho|gajoyoshosho]] || [[word:gajoyoko|gajoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajoyothon|gajoyothon]] || [[word:gajoyojon|gajoyojon]] || [[word:gajoyoshon|gajoyoshon]] || [[word:gajoyokon|gajoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajoyothoro|gajoyothoro]] || [[word:gajoyojoro|gajoyojoro]] || [[word:gajoyoshoro|gajoyoshoro]] || [[word:gajoyokoro|gajoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
